evidence: The paper ranks and selects variables using cross leverage scores (CLS), not random forest impurity importance. In Section 6.1, Random Forests are used only for predictive validation: "We perform the variable selection on a training data set...and then test the predictive performance on the remaining test data." Variable importance measures in Section 6.2 are from logic regression ("vim_type = 'logic'"), not from tree impurity. CLS derivation (Equation 3) is based on leverage in the column space: c_ip = <Q_i, Q_p>, where Q comes from the QR decomposition of the design matrix, not from split-based importance.
